evidence: "This is one of the funniest movies I've ever seen; however, it's not for kids!"
"If you like seeing the challenges that face people and all they have to go thru to overcome them, you'll love this movie."
"It doesn't take long to get you addicted and once that happens, you'll find yourself trying to figure it out which I haven't been able to do."
"The only reason I give it 3 stars is because I can't really remember what the movie was about."
"Slow moving at times but an overall good movie."
"Sometimes it seems like directors like to give the comedy more emphasis than the plot-line; however, this was not the case with this movie."
"The director played with the historical facts a little bit; but then again, who knows exactly what happened that long ago."
"I'm a big Natalie Portman fan and she plays this part extremely well."
"I watched this movie primarily because I'm a fan of Jessica Stroup."
"It is funny, once the characters are established."
"It is a good movie (she liked it more than I did)."
"This is one of my all time favorites!"

summary: The user enjoys a mix of comedy and drama, often appreciating character-driven narratives with emotional depth. They show a moderate sensitivity to production quality and have a fondness for specific actors, indicating a preference for engaging and relatable storytelling.
